title: Repository Source Review Tests for RFC-0001 Through RFC-0003
scope_boundary: These tests verify repository source structure and normative markers. They do not test product implementation behavior.

tests.purpose: Materiality threshold and safer default are normative.
required_markers: An assertion MUST be treated as material when at least one of these applies:
When materiality is uncertain, the assertion MUST be treated as material

tests.purpose: High-impact use and accountability fields are explicit.
required_markers: A use is high impact when it can:
A high-impact classification MUST record the responsible actor

tests.purpose: Governed intra-family disclosure is minimum-necessary and reviewable.
required_markers: A governed disclosure basis MUST state:
One family member's private statement MUST NOT be exposed to another without
Disclosure MUST be minimum necessary

tests.purpose: Representative authority is scoped and conflict-aware.
required_markers: Representative authority MUST record:
Age alone MUST NOT establish complete representative authority.
use MUST pause for independent or conflict-free review

tests.purpose: Technical categories do not imply universal legal conclusions.
required_markers: This RFC defines technical governance categories, not universal legal bases.
implementation MUST NOT claim that processing is lawful merely because it

tests.purpose: Representative authority records and conflict review are explicit.
required_markers: ### 5.3 Representative authority
A conflict, disputed authority, or high-impact request MUST route to a

tests.purpose: Retention profiles cover backup and exception handling.
required_markers: Every asset MUST map to a named retention profile.
backup-deletion or cryptographic-erasure handling
maximum exception period or mandatory review

tests.purpose: Cross-channel authority conflict uses restrictive safe behavior.
required_markers: It MUST maintain an explicit authority map
the most restrictive current instruction governs optional use
an unresolved identity or authority conflict freezes expansion, sharing,

tests.purpose: High-impact safety actions require actual authority.
required_markers: Every high-impact safety action MUST have:
A queue, model, mailbox, or unnamed team is not a named responsible role.

tests.purpose: Service profiles prevent false active-monitoring claims.
required_markers: Every implementation MUST publish and record one current service profile:
A `no_handoff` or `unverified` system MUST NOT mark a safety handoff complete

tests.purpose: Proportionality and precautionary temporary action are reviewable.
required_markers: For every high-impact action, the record MUST state:
A more intrusive temporary action under severe uncertainty requires a
Independent or conflict-free review MUST be triggered when:
The system MUST NOT automatically side with the operator.
